title: pelargonium × megaleion
intro: Pelargonium × megaleion, also known as the Cape Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × megaleion include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, syrup, or tincture, with the most popular being the traditional South African remedy, 'Cape Geranium tea', which is often used to treat various health issues.
